title: orchis praetermissa subsp. junialis
intro: Orchis praetermissa subsp. junialis, also known as the Juniper-leaved Man Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to parts of Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the healing of wounds, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it a valuable remedy for urinary tract issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
